name: Thin Lens Equation Calculator
description: Calculate image distance using thin lens equation.
seo_title: Thin Lens Equation Calculator – Easy Calculator
seo_description: Use our free thin lens equation calculator to quickly estimate img_dist, magnification based on focal, obj_dist. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate image distance for 20cm focal length, 30cm object.
result_context: The calculated result provid is the main output value.
steps: Calculate and display the img_dist result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculations
desc: Free online thin lens equation calculator. Enter focal length and object distance to get instant results.
